title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: NEAH-KAH-NIE HIGH SCHOOL SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 24705 US-101 Rockaway Beach, OR 97136 Eligibility: Students and staff only, all children 0-19 Hours: During School year: Tuesday/Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4:40pm, Wednesday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm. Email (800) 368-5182 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 368-5182 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Tillamook County SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 8:30am-noon, 1pm-4:30pm Wednesday 8:30am-12:30pm, 1:30pm-4:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEAH-KAH-NIE HIGH SCHOOL
